name: Terminal polish (continued)

issues.title: Bug: Ctrl+W and Ctrl+T in terminal close/open Tiki tabs instead of going to the shell
Bug: PTY reader corrupts multi-byte UTF-8 across 4KB boundaries; also overloads IPC during Tab completion (E4)
Enhancement: Add 'Clear Scrollback' to terminal tab context menu + Ctrl+Shift+K shortcut (E1)
Enhancement: 'Resume Conversation' action when the last command in a terminal was 'claude'
Enhancement: Add Settings explainer that Ctrl+Z in the terminal is SIGTSTP, not editor undo
Tech debt: Migrate desktop app from legacy 'xterm' package to '@xterm/xterm' namespace

note: Carries the 6 remaining 'Terminal polish' issues that were split out of v0.5.3 when build verification was blocked locally. Resume with /tiki:release v0.5.4 once Defender exclusions for the .pnpm virtual store are configured.
